absence.en: Her absence from class worried the teacher.
absence.zh: 她沒來上課讓老師很擔心。

accept.en: She was happy to accept the invitation.

accident.en: He was hurt in a car accident.

account.en: I opened a bank account last week.
account.zh: 我上週開了一個銀行帳戶。

active.en: She is active in many school clubs.
active.zh: 她活躍於許多學校社團。

activity.zh: 游泳是我最喜歡的活動。

actual.en: The actual cost was higher than we thought.
actual.zh: 實際的花費比我們想的還高。

addition.en: In addition to math, he teaches science.

address.en: Please write your address on the form.
address.zh: 請在表格上寫下你的地址。

admit.en: He admitted that he was wrong.

adult.en: Children must be with an adult.

advice.en: My teacher gave me good advice.
advice.zh: 我的老師給了我好建議。

affair.en: It is a family affair, not yours.
affair.zh: 這是家務事，不關你的事。

affect.en: The cold weather affects my mood.
affect.zh: 寒冷的天氣會影響我的心情。

ahead.en: Go straight ahead and you'll see it.
ahead.zh: 一直往前走你就會看到。

aid.en: They sent aid to the flood victims.
aid.zh: 他們送物資援助水災災民。

aim.en: Her aim is to become a doctor.

alarm.en: The fire alarm woke everyone up.

album.en: She keeps her photos in an album.

alike.en: The twins look very much alike.
alike.zh: 這對雙胞胎長得非常像。

altogether.en: Altogether, it cost two hundred dollars.
altogether.zh: 全部加起來花了兩百元。

among.en: She is the tallest among her friends.

amount.en: A large amount of water was wasted.

anger.en: He could not hide his anger.

angle.en: A square has four right angles.

ankle.en: She hurt her ankle while running.

anyway.en: It was raining, but we went anyway.
anyway.zh: 雖然下雨，但我們還是去了。

anywhere-anyplace.en: I can't find my keys anywhere.
anywhere-anyplace.zh: 我到處都找不到我的鑰匙。

ape.en: An ape is similar to a monkey.

appearance.en: Don't judge people by their appearance.

appetite.en: Exercise gives me a good appetite.

apply.en: She applied for a summer job.
apply.zh: 她申請了一份暑期工作。

approach.en: We need a new approach to this problem.
approach.zh: 我們需要解決這個問題的新方法。

argue.en: They often argue about small things.

arrange.en: I will arrange a meeting for tomorrow.

arrival.en: We waited for the arrival of the train.

arrow.en: Follow the arrow to the exit.

article.en: I read an interesting article today.
article.zh: 我今天讀了一篇有趣的文章。

artist.en: The artist painted a beautiful picture.
artist.zh: 那位藝術家畫了一幅美麗的畫。

attempt.en: She made an attempt to climb the wall.

attend.en: All students must attend the meeting.
attend.zh: 所有學生都必須出席會議。

attention.en: Please pay attention to the teacher.

author.en: She is the author of many books.

available.en: Tickets are available at the door.

avoid.en: Try to avoid sugar to stay healthy.
avoid.zh: 盡量避免糖以保持健康。

backpack.en: He carried his books in a backpack.

bake.en: My mother likes to bake bread.

bakery.zh: 這家麵包店賣新鮮的蛋糕。

balance.en: It is hard to balance on one foot.

balcony.en: She grows flowers on the balcony.

balloon.en: The child held a red balloon.
balloon.zh: 那個小孩拿著一個紅氣球。

bar.en: He ate a bar of chocolate.

barbecue.en: We had a barbecue in the park.

barber.en: The barber cut my hair short.
barber.zh: 理髮師把我的頭髮剪短了。

bark.en: The dog began to bark loudly.

base.en: The lamp has a heavy base.

basic.en: These are the basic rules of the game.
basic.zh: 這些是遊戲的基本規則。

basics.en: First learn the basics of cooking.

basis.en: We meet on a weekly basis.

bathe.en: She bathes the baby every evening.

battle.zh: 士兵們贏得了這場戰役。

beard.en: My grandfather has a white beard.

beat.en: Our team beat them by two points.
beat.zh: 我們隊以兩分擊敗他們。

beauty.en: We admired the beauty of the sunset.

beer.en: Adults may drink beer, but not children.
beer.zh: 大人可以喝啤酒，但小孩不行。

beg.en: The dog begged for some food.

behave.en: Please behave well at the party.

belief.en: She has a strong belief in herself.
belief.zh: 她對自己有很強的信心。

bend.en: Bend your knees when you lift the box.

better.en: I feel better after some rest.
better.zh: 休息之後我覺得好多了。

beyond.en: The mountains are beyond the river.

billion.en: There are billions of stars in the sky.
billion.zh: 天空中有數十億顆星星。

birth.en: We celebrated the birth of the baby.

biscuit.en: She ate a biscuit with her tea.
biscuit.zh: 她配著茶吃了一塊餅乾。

bit.en: I am a bit tired today.

blackboard.en: The teacher wrote on the blackboard.

blame.en: Don't blame others for your mistakes.
blame.zh: 不要把自己的錯怪到別人身上。

blank.en: Fill in the blank with the right word.

blanket.en: She covered the baby with a warm blanket.
blanket.zh: 她用溫暖的毯子蓋住寶寶。

blood.en: The nurse took a sample of my blood.
blood.zh: 護士抽了我的血做樣本。

board.en: We wrote the plan on the board.
board.zh: 我們把計畫寫在板子上。

boil.en: Please boil the water before drinking.

bone.en: The dog buried a bone in the yard.
bone.zh: 那隻狗把骨頭埋在院子裡。

bookstore.en: I bought a novel at the bookstore.
bookstore.zh: 我在書店買了一本小說。

border.en: They crossed the border into Canada.
border.zh: 他們越過邊界進入加拿大。

bother.en: Sorry to bother you, but I need help.
bother.zh: 抱歉打擾你，但我需要幫忙。

brain.en: Reading is good exercise for the brain.

branch.en: A bird sat on the branch of the tree.

brand.en: This is my favorite brand of shoes.
brand.zh: 這是我最喜歡的鞋子品牌。

brief.en: He gave a brief talk about the trip.
brief.zh: 他簡短地談了這趟旅行。

broad.en: The river is very broad here.

brush.en: Brush your teeth twice a day.

building.en: That tall building is a hospital.

bun.en: She ate a soft bun for breakfast.
bun.zh: 她早餐吃了一個鬆軟的麵包。

burden.en: The heavy bag was a burden to carry.
burden.zh: 那個重袋子背起來是個負擔。

burn.en: Be careful not to burn your hand.

burst.en: The balloon burst with a loud bang.

businessman.en: Her father is a busy businessman.
businessman.zh: 她爸爸是個忙碌的商人。

caf-cafe.en: We had coffee at a small cafe.
caf-cafe.zh: 我們在一家小咖啡館喝咖啡。

cage.en: The bird sang inside its cage.

calendar.en: I marked the date on my calendar.
calendar.zh: 我在日曆上標記了那個日期。

camel.en: A camel can live in the desert.

cancel.en: They had to cancel the trip.

candle.en: She lit a candle on the cake.
candle.zh: 她在蛋糕上點了一根蠟燭。

capital.en: Tokyo is the capital of Japan.

cash.en: I paid for the meal in cash.

castle.en: The king lived in a huge castle.
castle.zh: 國王住在一座巨大的城堡裡。

ceiling.en: A lamp hangs from the ceiling.
ceiling.zh: 一盞燈從天花板垂下來。

cell.en: The body is made of tiny cells.
cell.zh: 身體是由微小的細胞構成的。

centimeter.en: The pencil is fifteen centimeters long.
centimeter.zh: 這支鉛筆有十五公分長。

central.en: The hotel is in the central part of town.

century.en: The castle was built in the last century.
century.zh: 這座城堡建於上個世紀。

cereal.en: I eat cereal with milk every morning.
cereal.zh: 我每天早上吃麥片配牛奶。

chain.en: She wore a gold chain around her neck.

chalk.en: The teacher wrote with white chalk.

challenge.en: Learning English is a fun challenge.
challenge.zh: 學英文是個有趣的挑戰。

channel.en: Please change to another TV channel.
channel.zh: 請轉到另一個電視頻道。

chapter.en: I read the first chapter of the book.
chapter.zh: 我讀了這本書的第一章。

character.en: My favorite character in the story is brave.
character.zh: 我最喜歡故事裡那個勇敢的角色。

charge.en: They charge ten dollars for the ticket.

chart.en: The chart shows our monthly sales.
chart.zh: 這張圖表顯示我們每月的銷售。

chase.en: The cat likes to chase mice.

cheat.en: It is wrong to cheat on a test.

cheer.en: The fans cheered for their team.
cheer.zh: 球迷們為他們的隊伍歡呼。

chess.en: My father taught me how to play chess.

chief.en: He is the chief of the fire station.

childish.zh: 他幼稚的行為惹惱了大家。

china.en: The Great Wall is in China.

chopstick.en: I learned to eat with chopsticks.

claim.en: He claimed that he saw a ghost.

clap.en: The audience clapped after the show.

classical.en: She enjoys listening to classical music.

classmate.en: My classmate lent me a pencil.

clever.en: The clever fox tricked the crow.

click.en: Click the button to start the game.

climate.en: This area has a warm climate.

cloth.en: She wiped the table with a cloth.

clothing.en: We donated clothing to the poor.

cloudy.en: It is cloudy and might rain soon.
cloudy.zh: 天氣多雲，可能快下雨了。

coal.en: They burn coal to keep warm.

cockroach-roach.en: A cockroach ran across the kitchen floor.
cockroach-roach.zh: 一隻蟑螂從廚房地板上跑過。
